offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 orders/day, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and overstocking. We suggest order quantities based on sales trends instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels lead to stockouts and overstocking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Engage on Indie Hackers about inventory solutions
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Share in community forums for restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try sales trend analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Offer one-click export of simple reports
